metadata.title: Execute Code
metadata.description: Allows to execute code snippets within a note. Supported programming languages:  C, CPP, Dart, Golang, Groovy, Kotlin, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, Lean, Lua, CSharp, Prolog, Rust, Python, R, Ruby, Wolfram Mathematica, Haskell, Scala, Racket, F#, Batch, Shell & Powershell.

regex.source:
Notice(`Failed to parse code block arguments from line:
${firstLineOfCode}

Failed with error:
${err}`)
regex.target:
Notice(`无法解析代码块参数，来自以下行:
${firstLineOfCode}

错误信息:
${err}`)

regex.source: Notice(`Named export "${namedImport}" does not exist but was imported`)
regex.target: Notice(`命名导出 "${namedImport}" 不存在，但已被导入`)

regex.source: Notice(`Error: named export ${currentArgs.label} exported more than once`)
regex.target: Notice(`错误：执行了多次命名导出 ${currentArgs.label} `)
.log("已设置的 dotnet 路径为: " + sanitized)
.log("F# 文件扩展名设置为: " + value)

regex.source: .log(value ? "Now using ghci for haskell" : "Now using runghc for haskell.")
regex.target: .log(value ? "现在使用 ghci 运行 Haskell" : "现在使用 runghc 运行 Haskell。")
.log("已将 PowerShell 路径设置为: " + sanitized)
.log("PowerShell 文件扩展名设置为: " + value)

regex.source: .log(value ? "Embedding Plots into Notes." : "Not embedding Plots into Notes.")
regex.target: .log(value ? "将图嵌入到笔记中。" : "不将图嵌入到笔记中。")

regex.source: .log(value ? "Embedding R Plots into Notes." : "Not embedding R Plots into Notes.")
regex.target: .log(value ? "将 R 图嵌入到笔记中。" : "不将 R 图嵌入到笔记中。")

regex.source: .log("Only Show Current Block Log set to: " + value)
regex.target: .log("Only Show Current Block Log set to: " + value)

regex.source:
.error(
                new Term("throw", [
                  pl.error.syntax(
                    token ? token : tokens[expr_position - 1],
                    token && token.error ? token.error : ". or operator expected",
                    !token
                  )
regex.target:
.error(
                new Term("throw", [
                  pl.error.syntax(
                    token ? token : tokens[expr_position - 1],
                    token && token.error ? token.error : ". or operator expected",
                    !token
                  )

regex.source: .error("Invalid encoding. " + value + 'Please use one of the following encodings: "ascii", "utf8", "utf-8", "utf16le", "ucs2", "ucs-2", "base64", "latin1", "binary", "hex"')
regex.target: .error("无效编码. " + value + '请使用一下编码方式之一: "ascii", "utf8", "utf-8", "utf16le", "ucs2", "ucs-2", "base64", "latin1", "binary", "hex"')

regex.source: .error("Error in 'Obsidian Execute Code' Plugin while removing file: " + err)
regex.target: .error("在 'Obsidian Execute Code' 插件中移除文件时出错: " + err)

regex.source: name: "Run all Code Blocks in Current File"
regex.target: name: "运行当前文件中的所有代码块"

regex.source: text: "Settings for the Code Execution Plugin."
.setName("Embed R Plots created via `plot()` into Notes")
regex.target: .setName("将通过 `plot()` 创建的 R 图嵌入到笔记中")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, will use a main() function as the code block entrypoint.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，将使用 main() 函数作为代码块的开始.")

regex.source: .setDesc("The path to your gcc / Cling installation.")
.setDesc("Changes the file extension for generated F# scripts.")
regex.target: .setDesc("更改生成的 F# 脚本的文件扩展名.")

regex.source: .setDesc("Run haskell code with ghci instead of runghc")
regex.target: .setDesc("使用 ghci 运行 Haskell 代码而不是 runghc")

regex.source: .setDesc("The Ghc path your runghc installation will call.")
regex.target: .setDesc("您的 runghc 安装将调用的 Ghc 的路径.")

regex.source: .setDesc("Changes the file extension for generated shell scripts. This is useful if you don't want to use PowerShell.")
regex.target: .setDesc("更改生成的 shell 脚本的文件扩展名。如果您不想使用 PowerShell，这非常有用.")

regex.source: .setDesc("Maximal number of answers to be returned by the Prolog engine. tab is to prevent creating too huge texts in the notebook.")
regex.target: .setDesc("Prolog引擎返回的最大答案数量.tab用于防止在笔记本中生成过大的文本.")

regex.source: .setDesc("The path to your Rscript installation. Ensure you provide the Rscript binary instead of the ordinary R binary.")
regex.target: .setDesc("Rscript安装路径。确保提供的是Rscript二进制文件，而不是普通的R二进制文件.")

regex.source: .setDesc("The path to shell. Default is Bash but you can use any shell you want, e.g. bash, zsh, fish, ...")
regex.target: .setDesc("shell的路径。默认是Bash，但您可以使用任何您想要的shell，例如bash、zsh、fish等...")

regex.source: .setDesc("Changes the file extension for generated shell scripts. This is useful if you want to use a shell other than bash.")
regex.target: .setDesc("更改生成的 shell 脚本的文件扩展名。如果您想使用除 bash 之外的其他 shell，这非常有用.")

regex.source: .setDesc('Run the shell script in Windows Subsystem for Linux. This option is used if the global "WSL Mode" is disabled.')
regex.target: .setDesc('在Windows子系统Linux中运行Shell脚本。如果全局"WSL模式"被禁用，则使用此选项.')

regex.source: .setDesc("The path to the terminal. Default is command prompt.")
regex.target: .setDesc("终端路径，默认为命令提示符.")

regex.source: .setDesc("Changes the file extension for generated batch scripts. Default is .bat")
regex.target: .setDesc("更改生成的批处理脚本的文件扩展名。默认是 .bat")

regex.source: .setDesc("Path to your SQL installation. You can select the SQL dialect you prefer but you need to set the right arguments by yourself.")
regex.target: .setDesc("您的 SQL 安装路径。您可以选择您喜欢的 SQL 方言，但您需要自行设置正确的参数。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set the right arguments for your database.")
regex.target: .setDesc("为您的数据库设置正确的参数。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The path to your osascript installation (only available on MacOS).")
regex.target: .setDesc("您的 osascript 安装路径(仅适用于 MacOS).")

regex.source: .setDesc("The time after which a program gets shut down automatically. This is to prevent infinite loops. ")
regex.target: .setDesc("程序将在此时间后将自动关闭，以防止无限循环。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether or not to include a stdin input box when running blocks. In order to apply changes to this, Obsidian must be refreshed. ")
regex.target: .setDesc("在运行块时是否包含一个标准输入框。要应用对此的更改，必须刷新 Obsidian.")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether or not to run code in the Windows Subsystem for Linux. If you don't have WSL installed, don't turn this on!")
regex.target: .setDesc("是否在Windows子系统Linux中运行代码。如果您没有安装WSL,请不要开启此选项!")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether or not show print log only in current code block.")
regex.target: .setDesc("是否仅在当前代码块中显示打印日志")

regex.source: .setDesc("Pick a language to edit its language-specific settings")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择一种语言以编辑其特定语言设置")

regex.source: .setDesc(`Code to add to the top of every ${languageAlt} code block before running.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`在运行之前，添加到每个 ${languageAlt} 代码块顶部的代码`)
.setName("gcc / Cling 配置用于 C 语言")
